title: stelis mordica
intro: Stelis mordica, also known as the "Pleurothallis mordica" or "Pleurothallis," is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties and health benefits. Traditionally, Stelis mordica has been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
